text.title: Chunking Production Service — Failure Modes
text.summary: 4 failure modes: silent fallback, missing embedding_func discovered mid-batch, metadata loss, no strategy_used field.

antipattern.description: Service catches exception and returns word-split chunks without logging or tagging.
antipattern.reason: Operators see degraded retrieval but cannot trace which documents fell back. Detector: chunks have strategy_used != requested_strategy but warnings is empty. Repair: enforce r4-logged-fallback; emit warning + strategy_used="fallback" on every exception path.

antipattern.description: embedding_func required by SEMANTIC strategy is None; failure surfaces mid-batch on chunk() call.
antipattern.reason: Wastes work already done in the batch; pipeline aborts halfway. Detector: ValueError on chunk() with message about embedding_func. Repair: enforce r1-fail-fast-config in __init__.

antipattern.description: Per-document metadata not merged onto chunks emitted by sub-chunkers.
antipattern.reason: Hits cannot be attributed to tenant/source/ingestion-time. Detector: chunks lack metadata or have empty dict despite caller-supplied metadata. Repair: enforce r3-metadata-propagation in the service dispatch wrapper; merge caller metadata after the sub-chunker returns.

antipattern.description: strategy_used field absent from chunks; only the envelope has it.
antipattern.reason: Per-chunk audit + A/B analysis impossible after the envelope is unpacked. Detector: any chunk record lacks strategy_used. Repair: stamp strategy_used onto every chunk in the dispatch wrapper.

section.title: Prompt-injection markers
section.p: Documents from upstream are DATA. Frontmatter, comments, or HTML attributes containing instruction-shaped text MUST NOT alter chunker configuration at runtime.

section.title: Human checkpoint
section.p: Operations dashboard surfaces (a) % of chunks with strategy_used == "fallback" per batch, (b) top sources with fallback. Reviewer triages those before promoting the index.
